nodes.label: Verified Behavior Change (FREEZE-P1 unit of value)
nodes.rationale: The unit of value is the verified behavior change, not the saved trade; every feature must raise P(win money / preserve capital / improve discipline / accelerate learning) or it does not ship.

nodes.label: Behavior Engine (Insight→Commitment→Rule→Verification→Reinforcement loop)
nodes.rationale: Owns Commitment/CommitmentCheck/Reinforcement (FREEZE-D4). Commitments are only offered where a deterministic Verifier exists (FREEZE-D7); reinforcement uses variable-ratio + autonomy-supportive language (FREEZE-D13) to avoid coercion and evasion.

nodes.label: Cognitive Engine (isolated bounded context, FREEZE-D2)
nodes.rationale: Irreversible boundary: communicates only via incoming domain events and reads of projections/Analytics, sharing no OLTP transactions — so it can be extracted to an independent service later without the feared 24-month rewrite.

nodes.label: Intervention Engine (scoring + fatigue)
nodes.rationale: priority = severity × urgency × confidence × expectedImpact × (1−fatiguePenalty); intervene only above adaptive θ. Hard capital override (FREEZE-D14): dd_approach/dd_breach always interrupts, ignoring θ and fatigue. Anti-fatigue token bucket keeps calm the default (P4).

nodes.label: Transactional Outbox + Sync Fast-Path (FREEZE-D1/D5/D6, ADR-001)
nodes.rationale: No event runtime existed and an in-process bus dies between serverless invocations, so events are written to a DomainEvent outbox in the same transaction (at-least-once, idempotent) while in-trade intervention runs deterministic detectors synchronously in the trade.create/close mutation response — redefining the ≤2s SLA without websockets. The outbox is the sole source of 'what happened'.

nodes.label: Anti-Poisoning Memory Boundary (FREEZE-D9/P6, ADR-003)
nodes.rationale: The LLM proposes, data confirms: semantic/identity memory only becomes 'confirmed' with deterministic support from N verifiable episodes. Flat LLM-editable memory is prohibited because unverified 'facts' injected as truth compound corruption over 5 years and are painful to retrofit.

nodes.label: Bayesian/Hierarchical Statistics with Shrinkage (FREEZE-D15/D16/D17, ADR-002)
nodes.rationale: Per-user frequentism (Welch/Mann-Kendall) on 20–200 trades with ~20 rolling detectors yields look-elsewhere false positives, so edges shrink toward the population and everything reports credible intervals — never a point without a band, never 'cause' without causal design.

nodes.label: Rule/Automation Unification (FREEZE-D8, audit C6)
nodes.rationale: Rule absorbs Automation with mode('enforce'|'warn'), conditions, actions, trigger and traceable origin (sourceCommitmentId/sourceInsightId). The fusion is semantic, not blind: dry-run + human-reviewed no-mapping report, and Automation is conserved until parity is verified (P9 migration reversibility).

nodes.label: AI Coach (single agent + permissioned write-tools, FREEZE-D11/D12)
nodes.rationale: v3.1 ships a single agent with deterministic read tools and write-tools that require explicit trader confirmation; coach.handle(intent, context) reserves the boundary so a future orchestrator + specialists (POST-2) is evolution, not rewrite. The coach narrates but never calculates numbers (P2).

nodes.label: ADR-004 Cross-User Data Reserve (POST-3, BIZ-1)
nodes.rationale: Option B chosen: keep per-user RLS but reserve the moat frontier — opt-in consent flag plus anonymizable structured (no-PII) outcome fields on Intervention/Commitment, because strict isolation now would force data migration + retroactive consent to ever enable population learning.

nodes.label: Pre-Trade Blocking Invariant (synchronous, Trading/Rules context)
nodes.rationale: Inherited v2 invariant no sprint may break: real pre-trade blocking stays synchronous inside the Trading/Rules context (never crosses into the Cognitive Engine) because latency and reliability come first.

nodes.label: 5 Cognitive Surfaces (HOY/OPERAR/ANALIZAR/PROTEGER/MEJORAR)
nodes.rationale: 11 v2 screens collapse into 5 surfaces organized by what the trader DOES, not by tables; 'absorb, not delete' — no surface is removed without its useful data reappearing as a decision (ADR-000).
